features.title: Flexible Authentication
features.description: Bearer tokens, Basic auth, OAuth support

features.title: Flexible Configuration
features.description: CLI args or MCP_JENKINS_* env vars (priority-based)

features.title: Tool Filtering
features.description: Allowlist or blocklist tools via MCP_JENKINS_ALLOW_TOOLS / MCP_JENKINS_BLOCK_TOOLS

features.title: Multi-Instance Support
features.description: Connect to multiple Jenkins servers in one MCP entry, select per tool call

features.title: MCP Protocol
features.description: Native integration with Claude Desktop, Claude Code CLI

features.title: Real-time Monitoring
features.description: Build status, queue management, pipeline stages

features.title: Test Results
features.description: View test pass/fail counts and suites

install:
# No installation needed! Just use npx in your MCP config
npx --yes @kud/mcp-jenkins@latest
